notes: Verse anchors to chapter 3 thesis ("Why the Senior Still Ships"). constant adversary; insatiable like fire; yielding does not satisfy supports one or more of the thesis's four threads: (a) action is unavoidable, (b) the frame of action matters, (c) the senior's behavior sets team pattern, (d) kāma/krodha as structural focus-thieves. Verse fits its position in the chapter's progression (3.16-3.43 covers the cosmic argument's close, the exemplar argument, and the kāma diagnostic).
